title: iris pratensis
intro: Iris pratensis, also known as the meadow iris or purple iris, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its beautiful purple flowers and grass-like foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Iris pratensis has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Iris pratensis include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to promote skin and wound health, or taken internally to support respiratory health.
